_doc: Recurrence-signal patterns scanned against the AI AGENT's OWN output (last assistant message) at session Stop — NOT the user prompt. When the agent's reply mentions a recurring defect/regression, `sidecar architecture convergence stop-check` surfaces a once-per-session nudge to record the root-cause learning into ARCHITECTURE.json `convergence.records[]` (commons root-cause). Plain substrings match literally (case-insensitive); warn-only, never blocks (recurrence words false-positive). Override per-repo at .harness/convergence-triggers.json.
hint: 재발 신호 — 같은 원인의 결함/실수가 또 보인다(첫 발생이 아니라 재발). 그 학습을 설계 SSOT 한곳에 박아 같은 결함 재도입을 막아라. ① 기존 기록 확인: `sidecar architecture convergence list` ② 추가/갱신(id-keyed upsert): `sidecar architecture convergence add --id <ID> --state ossified --value "<핵심 학습>" --threshold "<재발조건/해결>" --source <원인파일>`. 인라인 @convergence 주석·별도 incident 트래커로 흩지 말 것 (commons root-cause).
